title: Crystal PvP Tweaks
body:
![Optimized. Clear. Precise](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/983cd9f3e84a0f8bef890c6968a7f0fffcb235d2.png)
_Elevate your PvP experience with a competitively optimized texture pack that enhances combat clarity._
#
[](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/crystal-pvp-tweaks) [](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/crystal-pvp-tweaks)
# ### Environment Tweaks - **Ore Border** ### Optimized Models - **Smaller Swords & Tools** for better visibility - **Compact Food Items** (golden apples, carrots, and all consumables) - **Reduced hand-held Block Sizes** - **Small Shield** - **Compact Potion Bottles** with clear visibility ### Reduced Visual Noise - **No fire overlay** - **Removed explosion & mace hit particles** - **No pumpkin overlay** ### Clean Audio Tweaks - **Disabled explosion sounds** #
### Rescaled Items ![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/3UNyeKHE/images/dd196e3440a5ff260b5f16190bc44ba910125cf0.png) ![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/3UNyeKHE/images/88efc06e804aac5df374e9ba1c70ed07852c5803.png)
# ### Screenshots ![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/3UNyeKHE/images/c4d6a2459c50ac947f8d5e4c8b1a9a98c2968645.png) ![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/3UNyeKHE/images/b551ca2b7b3e2a96bd0d111681aed06a7a432af4.png) ![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/3UNyeKHE/images/ebab023cdc10ffd88d1ff3c7685c80588a7311ed.png) #
